SEARCH
Package sttrj.game

Class Enterprise

Object
Entity
Enterprise
public class Enterprise extends Entity
Representation of the Enterprise, handles internal state for the Enterprise in our game.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Enterprise()
    Constructs an Enterprise instance with: shields at 500, energy at 2500, 10 torpedoes X:4, Y:4 for starting position The Enterprise can always detect itself.
    Enterprise(int x, int y)
    Constructs an Enterprise instance with: shields at 500, energy at 2500, 10 torpedoes X:x, Y:y for starting position The Enterprise can always detect itself.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    drainEnergy(int energy)
    Drains the given amount of energy from the Enterprise down to a minimum of 0.
    int
    energy()
    Returns the current amount of energy in the Enterprise's energy Stat.
    Entity
    fireTorpedo()
    Creates a Torpedo using Entity and reduces the Enterprise internal ammo tracking by 1, returns null if no ammo left.
    void
    gainEnergy(int energy)
    Adds the given amount of energy to the Enterprise up to it's maximum amount (3000).
    boolean
    hasTorpedoAmmo()
    Returns whether the Enterprise still has Torpedo Ammo to spend or not.
    void
    heal(int energy)
    Heal the Enterprise for the given amount of energy.
    void
    hit(int damage)
    Hit the Enterprise for the given amount of damage.
    boolean
    isAlive()
    Return if the Enterprise is currently alive.
    int
    shields()
    Returns the current amount of energy in the Enterprise's shields Stat.
    int
    torpedoAmmo()
    Returns an int representation of the number of torpedoes the Enterprise has to use.
    int
    transferEnergyToShields(int energy)
    Adjust shields and energy by the given target amount of energy.

    Methods inherited from class Entity

    adjustPosition, getX, getY, isMarkedForRemoval, isScanned, remove, scan, setSymbol, setX, setY, symbol, toString

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Enterprise

      public Enterprise()
      Constructs an Enterprise instance with:
      • shields at 500,
      • energy at 2500,
      • 10 torpedoes
      • X:4, Y:4 for starting position
      The Enterprise can always detect itself. It doesn't need to scan...

    • Enterprise

      public Enterprise(int x, int y)
      Constructs an Enterprise instance with:
      • shields at 500,
      • energy at 2500,
      • 10 torpedoes
      • X:x, Y:y for starting position
      The Enterprise can always detect itself. It doesn't need to scan...
      Parameters:
      x - horizontal starting coordinate for the Enterprise
      y - vertical starting coordinate for the Enterprise

  • Method Details

    • torpedoAmmo

      public int torpedoAmmo()
      Returns an int representation of the number of torpedoes the Enterprise has to use.
      Returns:
      an int representation of the number of torpedoes the Enterprise has to use.

    • fireTorpedo

      public Entity fireTorpedo()
      Creates a Torpedo using Entity and reduces the Enterprise internal ammo tracking by 1, returns null if no ammo left.
      Returns:
      a Torpedo using Entity returns null if no ammo left.

    • hasTorpedoAmmo

      public boolean hasTorpedoAmmo()
      Returns whether the Enterprise still has Torpedo Ammo to spend or not.
      Returns:
      ture if the Enterprise still has Torpedo Ammo, else false.

    • shields

      public int shields()
      Returns the current amount of energy in the Enterprise's shields Stat.
      Returns:
      an int representation of the current value of the Enterprise's shields Stat.

    • energy

      public int energy()
      Returns the current amount of energy in the Enterprise's energy Stat.
      Returns:
      an int representation of the current value of the Enterprise's energy Stat.

    • drainEnergy

      public int drainEnergy(int energy)
      Drains the given amount of energy from the Enterprise down to a minimum of 0.
      Parameters:
      energy - amount of energy to subtract
      Returns:
      amount of energy that was available to drain.

    • gainEnergy

      public void gainEnergy(int energy)
      Adds the given amount of energy to the Enterprise up to it's maximum amount (3000).
      Parameters:
      energy - amount of energy to add

    • transferEnergyToShields

      public int transferEnergyToShields(int energy)
      Adjust shields and energy by the given target amount of energy. If there is insufficient energy to transfer that, then transfer what is available.
      Parameters:
      energy - the amount of energy we wish to transfer to shields
      Returns:
      how much energy was actually transferred to shields. (this may differ from the amount ordered based on energy available etc.)

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Return if the Enterprise is currently alive.
      Returns:
      if the Enterprise is currently alive.

    • hit

      public void hit(int damage)
      Hit the Enterprise for the given amount of damage. Reducing its shields by the given amount. After damage is inflicted, checks if the enterprise still has shields above 0, if a hit took it down to 0 shields, or it was already at 0 shields when hit, the Enterprise is destroyed. (Simplified version for A1, because a Stat should be minimum 0.)
      Overrides:
      hit in class Entity
      Parameters:
      damage - how much damage we wish to do to the Enterprise

    • heal

      public void heal(int energy)
      Heal the Enterprise for the given amount of energy.
      Parameters:
      energy - how much do we wish to heal the Enterprise by.
